title: Assistant Restaurant Manager
description:
A fast food halal western restaurant is looking for an Assistant Restaurant Manager to join the team.


Working Conditions:

- Leave benefits and meals are provided.

- Air-conditioned environment.

- Shift rotation based, Operation hour :11am - 9:30pm.

- Six days work week


Location: Suntec or Century Square.


Job Description:

- Oversee and manage the efficient running of the restaurant outlet in line with the branch standards, while meeting the employees’, company’s and customers’ expectations.

- Attend to customers and their requests/feedback and resolve issues in a timely manner.

- Manage manpower schedules, staff development and comply with company’s SOPs and standards.

- Motivate and guide the employees in up-selling the food and beverage items.

- Supervise the effective control of food & beverages, inventory and labour cost to ensure that the operational expenditures stay within the budget.

- Monitor food and stocks wastage in the outlet and ensure that all supplies and stocks in the outlet are sufficient for the day to day operations.

- Update POS system as and when necessary.

- Carry out any ad-hoc duties as assigned.


Job Requirements:

- At least 2 Year(s) of working experience in the related field and industry.

- Have experience on POS restaurant operation and proficient in full spectrum of fast food restaurant function.

- Able to work under the pressure in a fast paced environment.

- Preferably with experience in back end operations of the restaurant eg. preparation and cooking.

- Meticulous, mathematically incline and possess good people skills.

- Self-discipline and self-motivated and enjoys interacting with people and serving customers.

- Ability to engage in physical activities which requires long hours of standing during the working shift.

- Always maintain high standard of personal hygiene with clean appearance and neat attires.

- Polite manner, energetic, cheerful, and hardworking.

- Possess enthusiasm in learning and keen to obtain feedback for improvement.

- Able to work on rotating shift basis which include weekends and public holidays.

- Applicants may be transferred within outlets to support the operations.


EA Lic No.: 18C2214

Name: Lee Kai Siang

Reg No.: R1655126

With our extensive network of resources, databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only demand the best in their teams.

 

We believes in providing excellent and personalised services to our clients and candidates thus maintaining a long lasting and successful working relationships

hiringCompany.description:
Big Fish Small Fish offers a variety of fish in our restaurants and for delivery. Fish fillet are battered and served with freshly sliced potato crisps or premium skin-on fries. You can choose anything from a typical Dory to premium choices like Hoki, Snow Cod, Sea Bass and Haddock. The batter is light and crispy sealing the moisture ensuring that the fish remains juicy.

We offer a wide variety of creative sauces such as Salted Egg Sauce, Cheese Sauce and Curry Sauce that will enhance your fish & chips dining experience. Enjoy the burst of flavors over an interesting experience when you pair your the fish with our freshly cooked crisps or the classical style with traditional fries. We even have our version of Spicy Fish & Crisps to cater to the local taste buds. The grilled menu is also available for a healthier option. Try them now in our stores in Tampines, Jurong, Bugis and Punggol now!
hiringCompany.name: MIRACLE FOOD CITY PTE. LTD.
